scripts.validate: npm run validate:syntax && npm run build && npm run validate:browser && npm run validate:links
scripts.validate:smoke: npm run build && playwright test tests/smoke.spec.js
scripts.validate:a11y: npm run build && playwright test tests/a11y.spec.js
scripts.validate:visual: npm run build && playwright test tests/visual.spec.js
scripts.validate:visual:update: npm run build && playwright test tests/visual.spec.js --update-snapshots
scripts.validate:perf: npm run build && playwright test tests/performance.spec.js
scripts.validate:syntax: node --check playwright.config.js && node --check scripts/clean-output.mjs && node --check scripts/check-links.mjs && node --check scripts/serve-static.mjs && node --check tests/smoke.spec.js && node --check tests/a11y.spec.js && node --check tests/visual.spec.js && node --check tests/performance.spec.js
